properties.description: Data Flow to pull data from ADLS Stg to ADLS Raw.

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	WildPath as string,
	FileName as string
}
source(output(
		PO_NBR as string,
		PO_SUPPL as string,
		PO_DESCR as string,
		PO_ISSUE_DATE as string,
		PO_APPR_DATE as string,
		SUPPLIER_CODE as string,
		SUPPLIER_NAME as string,
		SUPPLIER_COUNTRY as string,
		PO_ITEM_POS as string,
		PO_ITEM_SUB as string,
		ISH_POS as string,
		ITEM_SHIP_SUB as string,
		ITEM_DESC as string,
		IDENT_CODE as string,
		CLIENT_IDENT_CODE as string,
		TAG_NO as string,
		COMMODITY_CODE as string,
		SIZE1 as string,
		SIZE2 as string,
		SIZE3 as string,
		SIZE4 as string,
		ITEM_SHIP_ID as string,
		TOTAL_POLI_QT as string,
		ITEM_SHIP_QTY as string,
		RECD_QTY as string,
		UOM as string,
		UNIT_PRICE as string,
		CURRENCY as string,
		DELIVERY_DEIGNATION as string,
		ROUTING_METHOD as string,
		INCOTERM as string,
		DELIVERY_PLACE as string,
		PROM_CONTRACT as string,
		ROS_DATE as string,
		RN_NUMBER as string,
		RN_DATE as string,
		RN_QTY as string,
		RB_APPR_DATE as string,
		RN_DELIV_DATE as string,
		RN_READY_DATE as string,
		IRCT_NUMBER as string,
		IRCT_DATE as string,
		INSP_DATE as string,
		IRC_QTY as string,
		MCS_NR as string,
		MCS_DATE as string,
		HAND_OVER_DEST as string,
		HAND_OVER_PLAN as string,
		HAND_OVER_FCST as string,
		HAND_OVER_ACT as string,
		SHIP_DEST_1 as string,
		SHIP_PLAN_1 as string,
		SHIP_FCST_1 as string,
		SHIP_ACT_1 as string,
		SHIP_DEST_2 as string,
		SHIP_PLAN_2 as string,
		SHIP_FCST_2 as string,
		SHIP_ACT_2 as string,
		SHIP_DEST_3 as string,
		SHIP_PLAN_3 as string,
		SHIP_FCST_3 as string,
		SHIP_ACT_3 as string,
		TRAFF_ARR_DEST as string,
		TRAFF_ARR_PLAN as string,
		TRAFF_ARR_FCST as string,
		TRAFF_ARR_ACT as string,
		ARR_ON_SITE_DEST as string,
		ARR_ON_SITE_PLAN as string,
		ARR_ON_SITE_FCST as string,
		ARR_ON_SITE_ACT as string,
		MOC_CARRIER as string,
		MOC_VOYFLT_NUM as string,
		MOC_NAME_1 as string,
		MOC_NAME_2 as string,
		MOC_ETD as string,
		MOC_ATD as string,
		MOC_ETA as string,
		MOC_ATA as string,
		MOC_LOADING_PT as string,
		MOC_UNLOADING_POINT as string,
		MOC_BOL as string,
		BUYER as string,
		EXPEDITER as string,
		REQUISITION as string,
		REQ_SUPP as string,
		REQ_LI as string,
		REQ_SUB_LI as string,
		ACCOUNT_NUMBER as string,
		FORECASTED_DEL_DATE as string,
		IRC_DEST as string,
		IRC_PLAN as string,
		IRC_FCST as string,
		IRC_ACT as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'Filename',
	wildcardPaths:[($WildPath + $FileName + '.csv')]) ~> srcSMATPOExtractStage
srcSMATPOExtractStage derive(Filename = concat($WildPath,substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$FileName,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'Filename',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		PO_NBR,
		PO_SUPPL,
		PO_DESCR,
		PO_ISSUE_DATE,
		PO_APPR_DATE,
		SUPPLIER_CODE,
		SUPPLIER_NAME,
		SUPPLIER_COUNTRY,
		PO_ITEM_POS,
		PO_ITEM_SUB,
		ISH_POS,
		ITEM_SHIP_SUB,
		ITEM_DESC,
		IDENT_CODE,
		CLIENT_IDENT_CODE,
		TAG_NO,
		COMMODITY_CODE,
		SIZE1,
		SIZE2,
		SIZE3,
		SIZE4,
		ITEM_SHIP_ID,
		TOTAL_POLI_QT,
		ITEM_SHIP_QTY,
		RECD_QTY,
		UOM,
		UNIT_PRICE,
		CURRENCY,
		DELIVERY_DEIGNATION,
		ROUTING_METHOD,
		INCOTERM,
		DELIVERY_PLACE,
		PROM_CONTRACT,
		ROS_DATE,
		RN_NUMBER,
		RN_DATE,
		RN_QTY,
		RB_APPR_DATE,
		RN_DELIV_DATE,
		RN_READY_DATE,
		IRCT_NUMBER,
		IRCT_DATE,
		INSP_DATE,
		IRC_QTY,
		MCS_NR,
		MCS_DATE,
		HAND_OVER_DEST,
		HAND_OVER_PLAN,
		HAND_OVER_FCST,
		HAND_OVER_ACT,
		SHIP_DEST_1,
		SHIP_PLAN_1,
		SHIP_FCST_1,
		SHIP_ACT_1,
		SHIP_DEST_2,
		SHIP_PLAN_2,
		SHIP_FCST_2,
		SHIP_ACT_2,
		SHIP_DEST_3,
		SHIP_PLAN_3,
		SHIP_FCST_3,
		SHIP_ACT_3,
		TRAFF_ARR_DEST,
		TRAFF_ARR_PLAN,
		TRAFF_ARR_FCST,
		TRAFF_ARR_ACT,
		ARR_ON_SITE_DEST,
		ARR_ON_SITE_PLAN,
		ARR_ON_SITE_FCST,
		ARR_ON_SITE_ACT,
		MOC_CARRIER,
		MOC_VOYFLT_NUM,
		MOC_NAME_1,
		MOC_NAME_2,
		MOC_ETD,
		MOC_ATD,
		MOC_ETA,
		MOC_ATA,
		MOC_LOADING_PT,
		MOC_UNLOADING_POINT,
		MOC_BOL,
		BUYER,
		EXPEDITER,
		REQUISITION,
		REQ_SUPP,
		REQ_LI,
		REQ_SUB_LI,
		ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
		FORECASTED_DEL_DATE,
		IRC_DEST,
		IRC_PLAN,
		IRC_FCST,
		IRC_ACT,
		Filename
	)) ~> snkSMATPORaw
